title: Starmer warns of 'chaos' amid speculation about challenge
snippet: Health Secretary Wes Streeting is thought to be plotting a Labour leadership challenge as early as Thursday.

title: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
snippet: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.

title: Sydney dentist's patients warned of viruses including HIV
snippet: Authorities urged patients to get tested due to "poor infection control practices" at the Australian clinic.

title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
snippet: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.

title: Is this the real face of Anne Boleyn?
snippet: A computer science team believes they have discovered a previously unknown sketch of King Henry VIII's second wife - but not everyone is convinced.

title: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
snippet: The messages highlight the illegality of what people are searching for online and direct them towards help.

title: 'They shot my neighbour in the head' - the lakeside city traumatised by war
snippet: Rebel fighters and Rwandan troops are accused of committing atrocities after capturing the DR Congo city of Uvira in December.

title: Meet the 19-metre octopus that prowled the ancient seas
snippet: Giant octopuses may have ruled the oceans 100 million years ago, according to fossil evidence.

title: Gunshots fired in Philippine Senate where lawmaker wanted by ICC is holed up
snippet: Senator Ronald dela Rosa, a former police chief, enforced former President Rodrigo Duterte's deadly drug war.

title: White-tailed eagles to be released in Exmoor despite farmer warnings
snippet: Some farmers fear the reintroduction of the UK's biggest bird of prey will threaten their livestock.

title: 'We're living in a shed because of river pollution'
snippet: Jane and Tony Coyle spent seven years waiting for planning permission due to River Lugg pollution.

title: Daily pill to help keep weight off after stopping obesity jabs
snippet: The tablet - orforglipron - is available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.

title: Australian giant Coles misled shoppers with fake discounts, court rules
snippet: The decision, which comes amid similar case against Woolworths, could mean significant penalties.

title: Big tech bets on new mascots in bid to seem more cuddly
snippet: The likes of Apple, Microsoft and Google are all putting cartoon characters centre stage.

title: Thousands of Waymos recalled after robotaxi swept into a creek
snippet: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
